comments.author: RebarBotNava
comments.body: Drift-matrix suite verified locally (11 scenarios pass, incl. S0-S8 combinations + fsck --repair operator path + pre-feature store). Pushed as Gerrit change 461: https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/461. Awaiting LLM-Review + Verified.

compiled_state.description:
## Why
The ensure-registry (epic odd-vortex-elbow, landed) has per-surface tests, but no single
suite exercises the *differential* contract against a synthetic store that an OLDER rebar
initialized — one that is behind on arbitrary COMBINATIONS of the five ensure units and needs
different idempotent migration operations. Preserve a hermetic drift-matrix integration test so
the mechanism can be re-validated in the future as units are added or changed.

## What
Add `tests/interfaces/store/test_ensure_drift_matrix.py`: fabricate legacy drift on a chosen
subset of {env-id, gc-config, merge-ours, gitattributes, gitignore} on a fresh isolated tracker
(gc.auto=0 + autoDetach unset; merge.ours.driver unset; committed .gitattributes carrying the
retired `.reconciler-* merge=ours` line; a stale committed .gitignore; deleted .env-id), then
assert `run_ensures` corrects EXACTLY the drifted units. Hermetic: `tmp_path` tracker, sync off,
no network.

Scenarios (parametrized): S0 converged, S1 legacy-gc, S2 no-merge-driver, S3 retired-
gitattributes, S4 stale-gitignore, S5 no-env-id, S6 partial (gc+gitignore), S7 three-behind,
S8 fully-legacy; plus the operator `fsck --repair` path on a fully-legacy store; plus a
pre-feature store (no marker) reported pending then repaired.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `tests/interfaces/store/test_ensure_drift_matrix.py` is hermetic (isolated `tmp_path` tracker, `REBAR_SYNC_*` off, no network) and runs in the default (non-integration/non-external) tier
- [ ] Parametrized matrix asserts, per behind-subset: every drifted unit reports `changed`, every converged unit reports `ok`, none `failed`; the store reconverges (per-unit invariants: gc.auto unset + autoDetach=true, merge.ours.driver=true, no retired .gitattributes line, .gitignore ⊇ the expected set, .env-id present); only the two commit-units — `gitattributes` (`_gitattributes_unit`) and `gitignore` (`_gitignore_unit`), the only units that call `git commit`; env-id/gc-config/merge-ours are non-committing — commit, and only when behind
- [ ] Idempotency: a second `run_ensures` on each reconverged store is all `ok` and makes zero new commits (git-log assertion); `.ensure-applied` records all five ids
- [ ] Operator path: `rebar fsck --repair` converges a fully-legacy store (reports 5 changed) and a second `--repair` reports `0 changed` / no new commits
- [ ] Pre-feature store (no `.ensure-applied`) is reported `ensures: 0/5 applied` by read-only `fsck` and reaches `5/5` after `--repair`
- [ ] `make lint` + `make typecheck` clean; the new file adds no over-cap module and no drift-gate regressions
compiled_state.title: Hermetic drift-matrix integration tests for the ensure-registry
